race.comment: ROCK YA (5) got the job done at Doomben last time out and winning rider Rodd sticks in the saddle. Can go back-to-back without surprising. CAPTAIN MAVERICK (3) is yet to break through this campaign but hasn't been far away including a last start third over 1710m at this track. Should be nice and fit fourth up and can get the win here. EL JASOR (1) capable galloper but has been out of the placings at his last few runs, the latest when eighth over 2406m at Eagle Farm. Finds the right race and can feature. PUNJABI LANDING (2) bounced back to winning form at Eagle Farm last start and rates a chance in this field.
